bash: if [ -f biome.json ] || [ -f biome.jsonc ]; then npx @biomejs/biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f .prettierrc ] || [ -f .prettierrc.json ] || [ -f .prettierrc.js ] || [ -f .prettierrc.cjs ] || [ -f prettier.config.js ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v ruff &>/dev/null && [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v gofmt &>/dev/null && [[ "$FILE" == *.go ]]; then gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v rustfmt &>/dev/null && [[ "$FILE" == *.rs ]]; then rustfmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
